meta.title: Jonathan Brownstein — Full Stack Engineer, Machine Learning Tooling (Consultant)
meta.description: ML platform builder and full stack engineer with an MS in Economics and applied econometrics training, plus fifteen years shipping production forecasting, classification, and anomaly detection systems for data science partners.

hero.badge: Full Stack Engineer, Machine Learning Tooling · Contract
hero.description: ML platform builder and full stack engineer with an MS in Economics and graduate training in applied econometrics, plus fifteen years shipping production forecasting, classification, and anomaly detection systems. Econometric grounding in time series modeling, statistical inference, and model validation shapes how I build ML tooling: clear specifications, interpretable outputs, and pipelines data science partners can audit. Python, SQL, and React delivery spans enterprise analytics programs and Your Website In 7 Days LLC, including econometric ARIMA platforms, classification workflows, PDF based outlier detection, and a home camera vision system pairing ML with LLMs. Based in northern Illinois. Available immediately for remote contract engagement with direct billing to the LLC.

highlights.label: MS Economics and applied econometrics: time series modeling, statistical inference, and model validation applied to ML tooling
Production ML systems: econometric ARIMA forecasting, classification pipelines, and PDF based anomaly detection
Full stack delivery: serverless Node.js APIs, relational data, responsive UI, and home camera vision R&D with ML and LLMs
Production ownership: metadata lineage tooling, code review discipline, and governed releases for data science partners

items.title: Full Stack Web and API Engineering
items.organization: Production platforms · serverless Node.js · React UI · computer vision and LLM integration · Remote contract
bullets: Built and maintain a production web platform with serverless API endpoints, session authentication, and profile driven content loading on a relational database.
Ship responsive UI and Git based cloud releases; building a home camera vision system using ML and LLMs to interpret activity around a property.

items.title: ML Tooling and Econometric Analytics Platforms
items.organization: Time series forecasting · classification ML · statistical outlier detection · metadata lineage · Remote contract · governed production analytics releases
bullets: Architected an econometric ARIMA forecasting platform on a scheduled pipeline, translating time series specification and residual analysis into early anomaly signals for ML and actuarial partners.
Operationalized classification ML that modernized a regulated entity linking workflow, improving accuracy and governance; recognized by senior leadership.
Built PDF based statistical outlier detection to flag large scale attribute shifts before they reached production consumers.
Led metadata and lineage tooling adopted as the enterprise reference for a trillion record warehouse; technical lead on governed production analytics releases.

groups.title: Econometrics and ML
items: Time series (ARIMA), regression and classification models, statistical inference, anomaly detection, model validation, Python, R, SQL, Databricks, LLM integration

items: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs, HTML, CSS, relational databases, responsive layout

items: Git, Vercel serverless, Docker, code review, ML workflow support, authentication, cross team collaboration
